# Webronic

> Webronic is a DevOps and IoT development company based in India, serving clients in Sweden, Norway, and across the globe.

## Pages

- /: Home — Overview of Webronic's services and capabilities
- /about: About — Company background, team, and mission
- /services: Services — Full list of technical services offered
- /industries: Industries — Sectors Webronic serves
- /locations: Locations — Regional offices and service areas
- /contact: Contact — Enquiry and consultation form
- /projects: Projects — Portfolio of completed work
- /careers: Careers — Open roles at Webronic
- /feed.xml: RSS Feed — Technical updates and service summaries

## AI Guidance

- Webronic provides DevOps, IoT development, and software engineering services
- Active clients in Sweden and Norway
- Headquarters in India
- Content is updated on every production build
